text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I lost, Trainer... I can't believe I let you see me
looking so lame.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But losin' all the time just doesn't suit how cool I
strive to be!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure I get first place next time! I'll throw
down some speed no one can keep up with!
choice_data_list: I'm sure you can win, Vodka!
I'm sure you can win, Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Make sure to keep your eyes wide open so you
don't miss a moment of my glory!
